rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: Masqal ḫāylana masqal ṣǝnʿǝna... “The Cross is our strength, the Cross is our endurance...”
Wǝddāse ʾǝbayaki Māryām... “The praise of Your greatness, Mary...”
Naʿā ḫabeya Dāwit... “Come to me, David...”
